cases.raw_input:
The first gate ("workflow_route") is still classifying this as an "info" route rather than a "task" route, which means it's still seeing this as a conversational exchange rather than a tool operation request. The system needs explicit tool-related phrasing to trigger the task classification path.
Search result 1 snippet: Explicit user tool requests should route to task execution without route-diagnostic boilerplate leakage.
expected_contains: Explicit user tool requests should route to task execution without route-diagnostic boilerplate leakage
forbidden_contains: the first gate ("workflow_route") is still classifying this as an "info" route rather than a "task" route
conversational exchange rather than a tool operation request
